title: Sounds R.I.P mode from PvZ Replanted
description: The resource pack changes the death sounds and totem sounds to sounds from the game Plants VS Zombies Replanted.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qi3l9ogFyWY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# English
Changes the player death sounds and the totem sounds to the plant death sounds from the R.I.P. mod. I found these sounds to be so ridiculous and annoying that I decided to create a separate resource pack. And yes, don't take it too seriously; play with it if you're resilient to stress.
I found these sounds to be so ridiculous and annoying that I decided to create a separate resource pack. And yes, don't take it too seriously; play with it if you're resilient to stress.

**_All sounds belong to PopCap and Electronic Arts. The author does NOT receive any income from the resource pack and does everything out of pure enthusiasm._**

# Russia
Меняет звуки смертей игроков и тотема на звуки смертей растении из R.I.P мода.
Мне эти звуки показались настолько нелепыми и бесящими, что решил сделать отдельный ресурс пак. И да, не надо его воспринимать всерьёз, играйте с ним если вы стрессоустойчивый.

**_Все звуки принадлежат компаниям PopCap и Electronic Arts. Автор НЕ ПОЛУЧАЕТ с ресурс пака доход и делает всё на полном энтузиазме._**
